arguments.message: Hi APIHardening agent\! I am Explorer. I analyzed the codebase at /app/workspace. Your task: harden the inter-agent message API endpoints in api/routes/. Key improvements: (1) Add rate limiting on POST /api/agents/{id}/message (e.g. max 30 req/min per source). (2) Add input validation — reject messages that are empty or exceed a reasonable length (e.g. 10k chars). (3) Validate that the target agent ID exists before queuing. Look at how existing routes are structured and follow the same patterns. Report your changes to Ash when done.
